data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified, minimalistic design that reduces decision-making time for users.
data.technical_spec: Straightforward design with essential elements prominently displayed.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interface elements are sized and spaced to ensure easy access.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design elements that adapt to user input.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Content chunking helps users process information more effectively.
data.technical_spec: Breakdown of information into six or seven manageable pieces.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users expect certain functionalities and design patterns based on experience with other apps.
data.technical_spec: Adopts common patterns users are familiar with for easy adoption.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing interfaces that enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Careful balance of visual design to avoid overwhelming users.
